meta.title: Sandboxx's Alex Hollings nominated for Aerospace Reporter of the Year!
meta.description:
Last week, the Aerospace Media Awards released their list of 2023 award nominees. Among the many incredible journalists recognized, Sandboxx News' very own Alex Hollings was on the short list of nominees for Aviation Reporter of the Year!

You can see the full list of award nominees for this year here: https://www.aerospacemediadinner.com/

The 2023 Aerospace Media Awards will be held in Paris on June 18.

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexHollings52
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollings52
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AlexHollingsWrites
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/alexhollings52
